title: rivea hartmannii
intro: Rivea hartmannii, also known as Moonseed, is a plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family, native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rivea hartmannii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Rivea hartmannii typically involve the use of the plant's leaves, roots, and seeds, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or ointments for topical application.
